name: 更好的故障机器人 / Better Defect
author: Codex
description: v103/vPC compatible full build: restores 26 old Defect cards, keeps cross-run strict zero-sum rarity-local dynamic odds and per-card disabled-state persistence, fixes Fission orb visuals, restores the starter Strike -> Ball Lightning replacement, no BaseLib. Encyclopedia-only card disabling, historical versions and 29 custom card transformations share a persistent 35-point budget. v0.10.13 adds transformed Coolheaded (draw 2, channel Frost, Exhaust until upgraded) and changes transformed Chaos to channel 2 random orbs and Exhaust until upgraded.
